result.stderr:
AssistStudio Runner — Headless LLM task automation engine

Usage:
  assiststudio-runner [serve]              Start MCP server (stdio)
  assiststudio-runner exec <task-id>       Execute a task headlessly
  assiststudio-runner config <subcommand>  Manage credentials and configuration

Exit codes (exec mode):
  0  Succeeded
  1  Failed
  2  Timed out
  3  Task not found
  4  Already running

commands.payload:
AssistStudio Runner — Headless LLM task automation engine

Usage:
  assiststudio-runner [serve]              Start MCP server (stdio)
  assiststudio-runner exec <task-id>       Execute a task headlessly
  assiststudio-runner config <subcommand>  Manage credentials and configuration

Exit codes (exec mode):
  0  Succeeded
  1  Failed
  2  Timed out
  3  Task not found
  4  Already running

result.stderr:
Usage:
  assiststudio-runner config init [options]               Create runner.json
    --preset <name>        Preset name (e.g., "Claude")
    --provider <type>      Provider type (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Groq, Ollama)
    --model <id>           Model identifier
    --if-missing           Skip if runner.json already exists
  assiststudio-runner config set-credential <key> <val>   Store a credential
  assiststudio-runner config get-credential <key>         Retrieve a credential (masked)

commands.payload:
Usage:
  assiststudio-runner config init [options]               Create runner.json
    --preset <name>        Preset name (e.g., "Claude")
    --provider <type>      Provider type (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, Groq, Ollama)
    --model <id>           Model identifier
    --if-missing           Skip if runner.json already exists
  assiststudio-runner config set-credential <key> <val>   Store a credential
  assiststudio-runner config get-credential <key>         Retrieve a credential (masked)
